what_it_does: For workspaces enabled for customer managed keys (CMK) for managed services, the system catalog's data encryption settings can be configured to decrypt the statement text and error message fields in the query history system table. Preview This system table is in Public Preview. This article includes information on the query history system table, including an outline of the table's schema.
